summary: Completed comprehensive testing of B2B Catalog PDF Upload feature. All 13 backend API tests passed (POST /api/catalog/order with multipart form, GET /api/catalog/orders). All frontend tests passed: /foretag page loads with hero, PDF upload area (step 1), company/delivery form (step 2); PDF upload works with filename/size display; remove PDF and re-upload works; form submission creates order with success confirmation; Navbar 'Företag' link navigates to /foretag; Admin /admin/catalogs shows 25 orders with PDF download buttons.
critical_code_review_comments: catalog.py: POST /order correctly validates PDF content type, rejects non-PDF files with 'Bara PDF-filer tillåtna'
catalog.py: Multipart form correctly accepts pdf_file, company_name, contact_person, email, phone, address, postal_code, city, quantity, message
catalog.py: PDF files saved to /app/backend/uploads/ with unique UUID filenames
catalog.py: Response includes pdf_url pointing to /api/uploads/{filename} and original_filename
uploads.py: GET /api/uploads/{filename} correctly serves uploaded PDF files
BusinessCatalog.js: PDF upload via hidden file input triggered by clicking upload area works correctly
BusinessCatalog.js: PDF preview shows filename and size, remove button clears selection
BusinessCatalog.js: Form validation requires PDF file and all mandatory fields before submission
BusinessCatalog.js: Success confirmation shows 'Tack för din beställning!' with 'Beställ en till' button
AdminCatalogs.js: Correctly displays orders with PDF download buttons using data-testid='download-pdf-{order_id}'
seed_data_creation: Created test catalog orders with PDF uploads during backend testing (TEST_ prefixed companies)
context_for_next_testing_agent: B2B Catalog PDF Upload feature fully tested. POST /api/catalog/order now uses multipart form data (not JSON) with pdf_file (PDF), company_name, contact_person, email, phone, address, postal_code, city, quantity, message. GET /api/catalog/orders returns orders with pdf_url and original_filename. Frontend /foretag page has PDF upload area (step 1), company/delivery form (step 2), quantity controls, success confirmation. Admin /admin/catalogs shows all orders with PDF download buttons. Old JSON-based test file (test_catalog_orders.py) is outdated - use test_catalog_pdf_upload.py for multipart form testing.

Backend GET /api/catalog/orders.PDF accessible: ✓ PDF files accessible at pdf_url path

Frontend /foretag page.Page loads: ✓ Hero section, PDF upload area, form visible
Frontend /foretag page.PDF preview: ✓ Shows filename and size after upload
Frontend /foretag page.Re-upload: ✓ Can upload new PDF after removing

Frontend Admin /admin/catalogs.Order details: ✓ Company, contact, email, phone, address, date shown
